segments.text: The Lord picked me up and carried me away by his Spirit. He set me down in the middle of a valley that was full of bones.
He led me around them, and in all directions I saw many, many bones on the valley floor. They were really dry.
Then he asked me,
Son of man, can these bones come back to life?
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Lord God, only you know the answer,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: I replied.
He told me,
Prophesy to these bones and tell them, Dry bones, listen to this message from the Lord!
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: This is what the Lord God says to these bones: I will breathe into you, and you will come back to life.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I will give you tendons and have flesh grow over you and cover you with skin. I will breathe into you so that you will come back to life. Then you will know that I am the Lord.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: So I prophesied just as I had been ordered. When I started prophesying, suddenly I heard a rattling noise. The bones joined together, bone attached to bone.
As I watched, I saw tendons and flesh grow on them, and skin covered them; but the bodies didn't breathe.
Then he told me,

Prophesy to the breath! Prophesy, son of man, and tell the breath that this is what the Lord God says: Breath, come from the four winds, and breathe into these bodies, so that they can come back to life!
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: So I prophesied just as he had ordered me, and the breath went into the bodies, and they came back to life and stood up, a huge army!
He told me,
Son of man, these bones represent all the people of Israel. Listen to what the people are saying, ‘Our bones have dried up, and our hope has been crushed. We have been wiped out!’
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: So prophesy and tell them that this is what the Lord God says: My people, I'm going to open your graves and lift you out of them, and I will take you back to the country of Israel.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Then you will know that I am the Lord, when I open your graves and lift you out of them, my people.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I will put my Spirit in you and you will live again, and I will take you back to your own country. Then you will know that I, the Lord, have spoken, and I will carry it out, declares the Lord.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Another message from the Lord came to me, saying,

Son of man, get one piece of wood and write on it: ‘This belongs to Judah and the Israelite tribes allied to them.’ Then get another piece of wood and write on it: ‘This belongs to Joseph. This is Ephraim's piece of wood, and to the Israelite tribes allied to them.’
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Then join the two pieces of wood into one, so that you hold them as one in your hand.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: When your people come and ask you, ‘Are you going to explain what this is all about?’
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: tell them that this is what the Lord God says: I'm going to take Joseph's piece of wood, which Ephraim is holding, along with the Israelite tribes allied with them, and I'll join them with Judah's piece of wood. I will make them into a single piece of wood, and they will be as one in my hand.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: When you're holding the pieces of wood you've written on, and while everyone is watching,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: tell them that this is what the Lord God says: I'm going to bring the Israelites back from the nations where they've gone. I will gather them from everywhere and take them back to their own country.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I will make them one nation in the country, living in the mountains of Israel, and one king will rule them all. They won't be two nations any longer; never again will they be divided into two kingdoms.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: They won't make themselves unclean anymore with their idols or disgusting images, or with any of their rebellious sins. I will save them from all their sins when they abandoned me,  and I will make them clean. They will be my people, and I will be their God.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: My servant David will be their king. They will be united under one ruler. They will follow my laws, and they will observe and practice my regulations.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: They will live in the country I gave to my servant Jacob where your forefathers lived. They will live there with their children and grandchildren forever, and my servant David will be their prince forever.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I will make an agreement of peace with them. This will be an everlasting agreement. I will make them secure and increase their numbers, and I will keep my sanctuary there with them forever.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: My Tabernacle will be with them. I will be their God, and they will be my people.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: The nations will acknowledge that I am the Lord who blesses Israel, when my sanctuary is with them forever.
segments.speaker: The LORD
